evidence: "Fairly decent sci-fi show. a few twists in the story line have made this program interesting."
"Passable sci-fi scenario. A little on the weird side, but entertaining."
"Very good show. Well written, good character development. Twisty plots."
"plot moves very slowly, and characters are not introduced well."
"Very well done production. Beautifully photographed. Great story lines. Quality all around."
"Great production, scenery is outstanding, as is the acting."
"Always have been a fan of Titus Welliver since his appearances on NYPD Blue and Deadwood."
"photography is good, but the night exterior and interior scenes are very dark and hard to see on a small tablet screen"
"Great production, scenery is outstanding, as is the acting."
"Waste of an hour of my time."
"OK for mild entertainment. Fair to middling."

summary: The user shows a preference for sci-fi and drama genres, with a notable sensitivity to production quality. They tend to favor slower-paced narratives but express mixed feelings about narrative complexity and emotional engagement.
